source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/01 Intro - Blockout the Shrine - Unreal for VFX

evidences.content: Welcome to chapter nine 欢迎来到第九章 and this is our final project 这是我们的最终项目 This is the environment where we'll take everything 这是我们将会使用的环境 that we've learned over the last eight chapters 这是我们在前八章学到的东西 from lighting 从灯光开始 Niagara effects 尼亚加拉效果 and building environments to create 以及构建环境来创建 this final shrine environment from Raya and the Last Dragon 来自电影《寻龙传说》的最终神殿环境 So download these reference images below 所以请下载下面的参考图片 and add them into your peer rep 并将它们添加到你的同行代表中 because we'll be using all three of these images 因为我们将使用这三张图片 to see the different aspects of this environment 来了解这个环境的不同方面 and build it step-by-step 并逐步构建它 And by the end 到最后 we'll have created an environment 我们将创建一个环境 that you can add further animations 你可以在其中添加更多动画 and start creating your own action scenes 并开始创作你自己的动作场景 So take your time with this chapter 所以请花时间来完成这一章 The reward will be worth it at the end 最后的回报将是值得的 when you have an amazing environment 当你拥有一个令人惊叹的环境时 to start placing in characters 可以开始放置角色 to make some films by yourself 自己制作一些电影 And if you wanna see this final project at any time 如果你想随时查看这个最终项目 just go down to the UE VFX folder 只需进入UE VFX文件夹 go into sequences 进入序列 and under Raya 02 and finish 然后进入Raya 02和完成 you'll see this level sequence Raya 02 animation 你将看到这个级别序列Raya 02动画 And if you right click on this 如果你右键点击它 this will show you the list of levels 它将显示出级别列表 that were open when the sequence was created 这些级别在序列创建时是打开的 we can hop right into ML Raya 02 我们可以直接进入ML Raya 02 like we're seeing here 就像我们在这里看到的那样 And you can see exactly how this is set up 而且你可以清楚地看到这是如何设置的 with all of our levels 包括我们所有的关卡 and actors 以及角色 Niagara particle effects 尼亚加拉粒子效果 But let's start this completely from scratch together 但是让我们一起从头开始 So let's navigate over to our UE VFX folder 所以让我们导航到我们的UE VFX文件夹 and then go to levels 然后进入关卡 Raya 02 Raya 02 and then we have this level called ML Raya 02 start here 然后我们有一个叫做ML Raya 02 start here的关卡 And this will give us a blank level to start inside of 这将给我们一个空白的关卡来开始 The first things first 首先要做的是 let's add in our post process volume right away 让我们立即添加我们的后期处理体积 So I'll go to the quick add actors menu 所以我将转到快速添加角色菜单 and type in post process volume 然后输入后期处理体积 And then we can just drag this in 然后我们可以拖动它进来 If you remember correctly 如果你记得正确的话 we should search for infinite extent 我们应该搜索无限范围 so that this post process volume affects our entire scene 这样后期处理体积就会影响到整个场景 let's type in exposure 让我们输入曝光 and then we'll change our metering mode over to manual 然后我们将把测光模式切换到手动模式 and our exposure compensation to 10. 将曝光补偿设置为10 And this will give us some nice settings right off the bat 这将为我们提供一些很好的初始设置 And this made our scene a little bit darker 这使得我们的场景变得稍微暗一些 in a case like this 在这种情况下 you just boost up your sunlight just a little bit here 你只需要稍微增加一点阳光 from five to let's say eight 从五变成八 And now we'll have consistent exposure in our scene 现在我们的场景中的曝光将保持一致 we should always add in 我们应该始终添加 our human scale reference as early as possible 我们的人体比例参考尽早添加 So let's search for Echo 所以让我们搜索Echo and then we'll scroll down 然后我们向下滚动 until we find our BP Echo sequencer actor 直到我们找到我们的BP Echo序列器角色 that we can drag in here 我们可以将它拖到这里 and place her in the middle of our scene 并将她放在我们场景的中间 And now we immediately get a sense of scale 现在我们立刻能感受到尺度 for how big the scene should be 场景应该有多大 You can also just delete this text 你也可以删除这段文字 for the post process volume 用于后期处理音量 so that doesn't get in the way 这样不会妨碍 Let's start immediately on our blockout 让我们立即开始布局 So in the center 所以在中心 we have this stone circle 我们有这个石头圈 and then around that 然后围绕着 we have a bigger ring for this pond 我们为这个池塘有一个更大的环 So we should block out the size of this pond 所以我们应该确定这个池塘的大小 since we'll have to build around this 因为我们需要围绕它建造 And then we have a grassy landscape on the outside 然后我们在外面有一个草地景观 that we'll create using the landscape tools 我们将使用景观工具创建 And then lastly 最后 we'll just have to add in some walls 我们只需要添加一些墙壁 into the deep background 进入深处的背景 just so we have an end point to our scene 这样我们的场景就有了一个结束点 and we can see that after this grass landscape 我们可以在这片草地景观之后看到 around the edge 在边缘周围 So let's start by blocking out 所以让我们开始布局 each one of those aspects inside of our scene 我们场景中的每个方面 the first thing that we can do 我们可以做的第一件事 is create a quick landscape 是创建一个快速的景观 So if I go from selection mode over to landscape mode 所以如果我从选择模式切换到景观模式 and you can see right away 你会立刻看到 it prompts us to create a really large landscape 它提示我们创建一个非常大的景观 but we definitely don't need anything this big 但我们绝对不需要这么大的东西 So here we see we're in the create new menu 所以在这里我们看到我们在创建新菜单中 So let's scroll down 所以让我们往下滚动 and you'll see that we have a number of components list here 你会看到我们这里有一些组件列表 And if we just set this to one by one 如果我们只是一个一个地设置这个 you can see that we'll create 你会看到我们会创建 a lot smaller landscape to start with 一个小得多的起始景观 And this will do everything we need for now 这样就足够我们现在所需的了 So let's just press create 所以让我们只是按下创建 Now we get this sculpt brush that comes up right away 现在我们得到了这个立即出现的雕刻刷 If we click on here 如果我们点击这里 we can start molding our landscape tool 我们可以开始塑造我们的景观工具 but let's not do that quite yet 但我们还不要那么做 Let's actually jump back into selection mode 实际上，我们回到选择模式 And now if we grab the landscape 现在，如果我们抓住这个景观 we can see that this has raised 100 units off the ground 我们可以看到这个已经从地面上升高了100个单位 So let's just change our Z location to zero 所以让我们将我们的Z位置改为零 And now we can delete our square floor 现在我们可以删除我们的方形地板 So then let's select our unreal ball and echo 那么让我们选择我们的虚幻球和回显 and press the end key 然后按下结束键 And now both of them will pop to the floor 现在它们两个都会弹到地板上 But let's block out the surface area for our pond 但是让我们为我们的池塘划定表面区域 So we can now hop back into our modeling tools 所以我们现在可以回到我们的建模工具 And just like before 就像之前一样 we can create a new cylinder object 我们可以创建一个新的圆柱体对象 And from here 从这里开始 we can create a cylinder 我们可以创建一个圆柱体 anywhere inside of our scene 在我们的场景中的任何地方 I was trying out some settings 我试了一些设置 You can mess with it going a little bit smaller 你可以稍微调小一点 or bigger 或者更大一些 but I found that 750 units 但我发现750个单位 seems to get us fairly close to our reference 似乎使我们与参考值相当接近 So from here 所以从这里开始 I can just click anywhere in our scene 我可以在我们的场景中的任何地方点击 and press accept to create this new cylinder 然后按接受来创建这个新的圆柱体 And I go into the location transform 然后我进入位置变换 and press the reset button 并按下重置按钮 This will move it to zero 这将把它移动到零 zero inside of our scene 我们场景内的零 which is exactly what we want 这正是我们想要的 And then let's place this just above the ground 然后让我们把它放在地面上方 And already this gives us a really good clue for scale 这已经给了我们一个非常好的比例线索 And if we compare this to our reference image 如果我们将其与我们的参考图像进行比较 we can see that all that's missing 我们可以看到所有缺少的部分 is our shrine in the middle and our background walls 只有我们中间的神社和背景墙 So let's create another cylinder 所以让我们创建另一个圆柱体 Let's just click anywhere here 让我们在这里随便点击一下 And then we can adjust the radius 然后我们可以调整半径 So we're just trying to rough this in 所以我们只是试图大致完成这个 but let's say something around 200 但是我们可以说大约200左右 for the radius seems about right 半径看起来差不多合适 And let's set the height a little bit higher to about 40 然后让我们将高度设置得稍高一些，大约为40 because we can always move this further into the ground 因为我们总是可以将其进一步移入地面 if it's too tall 如果它太高的话 But I think this is good for now 但我觉得现在这样就可以了 Let's just press accept and do the same thing 让我们只需按下接受并做同样的事情 Let's reset our transform values so it pops to zero 让我们重置我们的变换值，使其弹到零 and then let's adjust echo 然后让我们调整回声 So bring her up and press the N key 所以把她抬起来，按下N键 and let's rotate her around 然后让我们围绕她旋转 so she matches the camera angle 这样她就与相机角度匹配了 where she's looking at our center shrine 她正在看我们中心的神社 And then we can take this material preview mesh 然后我们可以使用这个材质预览网格 and just move this to zero 并将其移动到零 zero as well 同样是零 And we'll use this as the rock 我们将使用这个作为岩石 in the middle of our shrine for now 暂时放在我们神社的中间 until we replace it later on 直到我们以后替换它为止 Press the N key and pop that into place 按下N键，将其放置在适当位置 And then we can shrink this down to about 05 然后我们可以将其缩小到大约05 for a scale 用于缩放 just so it works as a placeholder 只需使其作为占位符起作用 So this is good enough to get started 所以这已经足够开始了 Now let's create a camera 现在让我们创建一个相机 so we can block in our first composition 这样我们就可以在我们的第一个构图中进行阻塞 to make sure that we're building everything the right way 确保我们正在以正确的方式构建一切 And we can start comparing our scene one-to-one 然后我们可以开始逐一比较我们的场景 with our reference image 与我们的参考图像比较 So let's go to the UEV effects folder 让我们进入UEV效果文件夹 go to sequences and then Raya 02 进入序列，然后进入Raya 02 and create a new level sequence 并创建一个新的层序列 by going to the cinematics level sequence actor here 通过在这里进入电影级序列演员 And we'll type in LS Raya 02 anim 然后我们将输入LS Raya 02 anim And then we can open this up 然后我们可以打开这个 And typically I'll just start 通常我会开始 by creating a new camera from view 通过从视图创建一个新相机 even though the defaults are usually pretty messy 尽管默认设置通常很混乱 with the cine camera actor 使用电影相机演员 So we're gonna do the same exact steps as before 所以我们将执行与之前完全相同的步骤 Let's right click our cine camera actor 让我们右键点击我们的电影相机演员 Let's convert this to possessible 让我们将其转换为可占有的 meaning that this actor will now exist 这意味着这个演员现在将存在 in our world outliner at all times 始终在我们的世界大纲中 Whereas a spawnable actor will just disappear 而可生成的演员将会消失 whenever we close our sequencer 每当我们关闭序列编辑器时 So let's convert that to possessible 所以让我们将其转换为可占有的 if we press the camera icon 如果我们按下相机图标 of the actor in our sequencer 在我们的序列编辑器中的演员的相机图标 this camera icon below 下面的这个相机图标 not the camera icon by our camera cuts track 而不是我们的相机切换轨道上的相机图标 but piloting our cine camera actor 而是操纵我们的电影相机演员 when we press this button 当我们按下这个按钮时 now we can move around as the camera point of view 现在我们可以随着摄像机的视角移动 and start matching this up to our reference image 然后开始将其与我们的参考图像匹配 So let's scroll down the details panel of our camera here 所以让我们向下滚动这里的摄像机详细信息面板 We don't need to use the look at tracking settings 我们不需要使用“注视跟踪”设置 because this will aim our camera 因为这会使我们的摄像机对准 at whatever actor we wanna track 对我们想要跟踪的任何演员 We don't wanna rotate the camera towards any actor 我们不想将摄像机旋转到任何演员面前 but we do wanna track our focus 但我们确实想要跟踪我们的焦点 So if we go down to the focus settings 所以如果我们滚动到焦点设置 change our focus method to tracking 将我们的焦点方法更改为跟踪 now we can select Echo as our actor to track here 现在我们可以选择Echo作为我们要跟踪的演员 And if we debug our focus plane 如果我们调试我们的焦点平面 now we can see our camera is perfectly focused with Echo 现在我们可以看到我们的摄像机与Echo完美对焦 even if we move the camera forward and backward 即使我们将摄像机前后移动 So now we have our focus locked 所以现在我们锁定了焦点 which is great 这非常好 let's actually take Echo 让我们实际上带上Echo and add her into our sequence 并将她添加到我们的序列中 So we can do this by pressing the add track 我们可以通过按下添加轨道来做到这一点 and add actor to sequence button here 并在这里按下“添加演员到序列”按钮 or you can just select Echo 或者你可以直接选择Echo drag her actor from the outliner 从大纲中拖动她的角色 and just drop it inside of sequencer 然后将其放入序列器中 And now we can see she's properly added into sequencer 现在我们可以看到她已经正确添加到序列器中 And now we're ready to add in a simple animation 现在我们准备添加一个简单的动画 There's a kneeling animation for Echo 有一个给Echo的跪拜动画 So let's add a new track here 所以让我们在这里添加一个新的轨道 You might be looking for an animation track 你可能正在寻找一个动画轨道 but you can see it doesn't exist anywhere 但你可以看到它在任何地方都不存在 But if you remember why 但如果你记得为什么 it's because this blueprint is not a skeletal mesh 那是因为这个蓝图不是一个骨骼网格 A skeletal mesh 一个骨骼网格 is the homepage for our characters 是我们角色的主页 And that's where we add animations onto a character 这就是我们将动画添加到角色的地方 is through the skeletal mesh 通过骨骼网格 In this case 在这种情况下 our blueprint has this character mesh component 我们的蓝图有这个角色网格组件 underneath it 在其下面 We can see here 我们可以在这里看到 we have this skeletal mesh icon 我们有这个骨骼网格图标 and we can see that Echo is just a skeletal mesh 我们可以看到Echo只是一个骨骼网格 nested inside of BP Echo sequencer 嵌套在BP Echo序列中 Just a friendly reminder there 这只是一个友善的提醒 So let's add this character mesh component into sequencer 让我们将这个角色网格组件添加到序列中 And from here 从这里开始 now we can add in an animation track 现在我们可以添加一个动画轨道 and we'll see all of the default animations 我们将看到所有默认的动画 that come with Echo when we imported her early on 这些是在我们早期导入Echo时附带的 So if we scroll down to the bottom 所以如果我们滚动到底部 we can see that there's a sitting idle animation 我们可以看到有一个坐着的空闲动画 So let's select that 让我们选择那个 And we can see that it lasts the entire duration 我们可以看到它持续了整个持续时间 of our sequence 我们的序列 And now she has some really subtle animation 现在她有一些非常细微的动画 as she's sitting down 当她坐下时 which will help us match our reference 这将帮助我们匹配参考资料 so I'm just gonna line up the camera here 所以我只是要在这里对准相机 So just remember for the camera controls 所以只要记住相机控制 you have WASD obviously 你显然有WASD but if you use the Q and E key 但如果你使用Q和E键 we can crane up or down 我们可以向上或向下移动 So I wanna be fairly low to the ground 所以我想离地面相对较低 That way we could include some foliage and shrubbery 这样我们可以包含一些植被和灌木 close to the camera in the foreground 靠近前景的相机附近 but still be connected to our entire scene 但仍然与整个场景相连 So something like this will get us started off 所以像这样会让我们开始进展 don't worry too much 不要太担心 We'll add some camera animation onto this later on 稍后我们将添加一些相机动画 and slightly reframe the camera 并稍微调整相机的构图 but this will at least let us compare our scene 但至少这样可以让我们比较我们的场景 to our reference one-to-one 与我们的参考场景进行一对一对比 So I'm gonna click on the camera icon again 所以我要再次点击相机图标 to stop piloting that camera 停止操控相机 And now I can move around inside of our scene 现在我可以在场景内移动 let's just add in some cave walls 让我们只是添加一些洞穴墙壁 into the background 到背景中 But before we do this 但在此之前 we'll need to create our levels 我们需要创建我们的关卡 just like we did in our Raya 01 master level 就像我们在Raya 01主关卡中所做的那样 So to do this 所以要做到这一点 we're just gonna create a couple additional levels 我们只需创建几个额外的关卡 for our geometry 用于我们的几何图形 So I'm gonna type in sub level SL underscore Raya 02 geo 所以我要输入子关卡SL_Raya_02_geo SL Raya 02 lighting SL_Raya_02_lighting SL Raya 02 effects SL_Raya_02_effects and SL Raya 02 animation 和SL_Raya_02_animation And I'm gonna take all four of these levels 我要将这四个关卡都选中 by shift clicking on all of them 通过按住Shift键并点击它们 and just drag them underneath our persistent level here 然后将它们拖到我们的持久关卡下面 And then let's select all four of these 然后让我们选择这四个关卡 right click and change their streaming method 右键单击并更改它们的流式传输方法 to always loaded 始终加载 And this will make it so they always appear 这样它们将始终显示 when we're rendering through movie render queue 当我们通过电影渲染队列进行渲染时 let's double click on the anim level 让我们双击动画关卡 and then we'll take echo and press control M 然后我们将取出echo并按下Ctrl+M键 to move echo into our animation level 将echo移动到我们的动画关卡中 And let's do the same thing for our camera as well 而且我们也要对相机做同样的操作 Just select it in the outliner and press control M 只需在大纲视图中选择它，然后按下Ctrl+M And now we can see both of these exist 现在我们可以看到它们都存在了 in the animation level 在动画层级中 And now to add in our cave walls 现在，我们要添加我们的洞穴墙壁 we're gonna swap from our animation level 我们将从动画层级切换 over to the geo level 切换到几何层级 So for our walls 所以对于我们的墙壁 I'm actually gonna use the same asset we used 我实际上要使用我们之前使用的相同资产 in our tunnel environment 在我们的隧道环境中 before we started to bend it to create our tunnel 在我们开始弯曲它以创建隧道之前 So if you follow this path here 所以，如果你按照这个路径 UEV effects 101 UEV特效 101 Raya 01 Raya 01 and then the modeling tools folder 然后是建模工具文件夹 you'll see we have this static mesh Fortstone wall 01 你会看到我们有这个静态网格Fortstone墙壁01 that we can just drag into our scene 我们只需将其拖入场景中 And then we can immediately apply 然后我们可以立即应用 our Fortstone wall material 我们的Fortstone墙壁材质 if we turn angle snapping on 如果我们打开角度捕捉 we can rotate this into place 我们可以将其旋转到指定位置 So move this up by 90 degrees 将其上移90度 and rotate it an X and Y by 90 degrees 将其绕X轴和Y轴旋转90度 And then let's bring this up and press the end key 然后，将其上移并按下结束键 So we know that it perfectly snaps 这样我们就知道它完美地对齐了 to the ground of our landscape 与我们的地形地面对齐 Now we're gonna have to make these walls pretty big 现在我们需要把这些墙壁做得很大 And if we look at our reference image 如果我们看一下我们的参考图像 these will be very dark and in the background 这些将会非常暗，并且在背景中 but at least we do have some nice geometry detail 但至少我们有一些漂亮的几何细节 in case we do light up our wall 以防我们点亮我们的墙壁 But to help us out with this size 但为了帮助我们解决这个大小的问题 I'm gonna scale these up by three 我要把它们放大三倍 to make them a lot bigger 让它们变得更大 So that we can move them into our background 这样我们就可以把它们移到背景中 Now from here 现在从这里开始 let's turn on translation snapping 让我们打开平移捕捉 so we can get a little bit more of a consistent result 这样我们可以得到更加一致的结果 when moving this around 在移动它时 And I'm gonna move this to about 1250 or 1400 in X 我要把它移动到大约1250或1400的X坐标 just move it really far back 只需将其移动到很远的后方 so that it's out of the way from our scene 这样它就不会挡住我们的场景了 And now we can start rotating these around the shrine 现在我们可以开始围绕神社旋转它们了 And to keep this simple 为了简单起见 we can make eight copies 我们可以制作八个副本 just like a stop sign 就像一个停车标志一样 We'll have eight different sides 我们将有八个不同的面 and have an octagonal shape around the edge here 并在边缘处形成一个八角形 So an easy way to do that 所以一个简单的方法是 is we can actually just create a basic empty actor 我们实际上只需创建一个基本的空演员 drag it anywhere into our scene 将它拖动到场景中的任何位置 We'll keep it in the geometry level 我们将把它保留在几何层级中 just pop that back to zero 将其恢复为零 And now if we press on this cog wheel in the top right 现在，如果我们按下右上角的齿轮图标 let's only show actors in our current level 让我们只显示当前层级中的演员 Now let's select our fort stone wall 现在让我们选择我们的堡垒石墙 change this to movable 将其更改为可移动的 And now let's make a duplicate of our stone wall 现在让我们制作一个石墙的副本 if you saw here when
